Om Salon Cairo

Personlig pleje,
professionelt
resultat

Vi tror på, at et godt klip starter med at lytte. Hos os møder du altid en frisør der tager sig tid til at forstå netop dit hår, din livsstil og dit udtryk.

Professionel frisørsalon — vi skaber looks der passer til dig.

Book din tid i dag →

Vi sætter altid kunden i centrum — dit hår er vores håndværk og din selvtillid er vores resultat

Vores
ydelser

Fra det klassiske snit til den store farvetransformation. Vi tilbyder alt hvad dit hår behøver — udført med præcision og omsorg.

Herreklip

Præcis klip, vask og styling tilpasset dit look og din stil.

Dameklip

Klip, vask og blow-dry — skræddersyet til dit hår og dine ønsker.

Farve & highlights

Fra subtile babylights til fuld farvetransformation med professionelle produkter.

Hårkure & behandlinger

Nærende kurer der genopretter glans, styrke og skalpsundhed.

Blow-dry & styling

Perfekt finish til hverdag, fest eller særlige lejligheder.

Brudefrisure

Din store dag fortjener det smukkeste hår — konsultation inkluderet.

Priser der
passer til alle

Vejledende priser. Præcis pris aftales ved konsultation.

Glade hår-dage
02 / Hvad vi gør
01
Præcisionsklip
Hvert klip former sig efter dit ansigt, din hårtekstur og din livsstil. Vi lytter før vi klipper, og klipper med øje for detaljen.
02
Farve & balayage
Fra subtile highlights til fuld farvetransformation. Vi rådgiver om hvad der passer til dit hår og din hudtone — og leverer et resultat der holder.
03
Behandlinger & pleje
Keratin, hårkure og nærende behandlinger der styrker dit hår fra rod til spids. Vi bruger professionelle produkter fra kendte mærker.
04
Styling & særlige lejligheder
Blow-dry, updo, brudefrisure eller gallastyling — vi sørger for at dit hår ser perfekt ud til enhver anledning.
05
Skæg & herrebehandlinger
Professionel skægtrimning, konturfremhævning og herreklip der samler det hele i ét poleret look.
06
Gratis farvekonsultation
Usikker på farve? Ring os op — vi tilbyder gratis konsultation inden enhver farvebehandling, så du ved præcis hvad du går hjem med.
Anmeldelser

Hvad siger vores kunder?

★★★☆☆

"My first visit to this salon. When I sat down I wanted to show him a photo on my phone, of the style I wanted, but he said he was sure I didn’t need to show a photo because it’s a classic style. I found this a bit strange as it was my first time there, and my hair hadn’t been cut for almost a month, so I didn’t know what classic style he had in mind, without a photo of description from me. I then gave him a verbal description to try to make sure I got what I wanted. I don’t know if he has difficulty hearing or if he doesn’t listen, but he had a tendency to talk over me when I tried to describe or explain what I wanted, and I couldn’t make myself understood. To be honest, I got the impression that he felt he knew better than me, what I wanted. The cut was okay, but not exactly as I wanted it - he cut the fringe/top very short without asking me how much to trim off. When I mentioned this to him in a gentle way, he got defensive and started telling me he’d been a barber for 35 years, and told me something about how some customers are unsure what they want, but that they need to know what they want and say what they want. Based on all the other good reviews, I guess he may just have been having a bad day, or the chemistry wasn’t good, but I decided I won’t be going back, even though it’s extremely convenient based on where I now live. When I’m a first-time customer, I need the chance to explain what I want, and feel listened to. It’s my hair and my personal appearance and self-confidence on the line, after all. I should also mention that the salon wasn’t open when I went by at 11.15 this morning. The sign on the door and the listing on Google says it opens at 11.00. I called, but there was no pickup. I left a message and only got a reply at 13.40 with an offer of an appointment at 16.00. So just be sure to call before you stop by."

— Ryan Bysshe
★★★★★

"Great experience at Salon Cairo! The barber is friendly, welcoming and interesting person, offers a coffee, and works very carefully. The atmosphere is very cozy. If you value attention to details – highly recommended"

— Vaidotas Kisielius
★★★★★

"I stopped by today by chance, but I will definitely be coming back. The service was excellent, and the owner was approachable and professional. Highly recommended — nothing but praise!"

— Ronald Boršić
★☆☆☆☆

"My beard befor and after. He told me he would “only” cut off 1 cm… that’s atleast 3 cm?? The first picture is almost a month ago, so my beard was actually a little longer than that on the picture…"

— valmir zimberi
★★★★★

"I had a great first experience with the place. He was friendly, listened to what I wanted carefully, and did a perfect job. He even suggested an idea that improved my haircut. I appreciated the tea, coffee, and water offered. Despite calling just an hour before, he fit me in and finished the haircut quickly. Highly recommend him, He also speaks Arabic, which can be a great comfort for Arabic-speaking clients. Overall, it was a fantastic experience, and I will definitely be returning."

— ahmed yahya
03 / FAQ

Spørgsmål & svar

Har du et spørgsmål der ikke er besvaret her? Ring direkte — vi er her for at hjælpe.

42 21 11 96 →
Skal jeg booke tid på forhånd? +
Vi anbefaler altid booking — specielt til farvebehandlinger og i weekenden. Ring til os og vi finder hurtigt en tid.
Hvad er inkluderet i en klipning? +
Alle klip inkluderer vask, klip og grundlæggende blow-dry. Du bestemmer stylingen og vi vejleder undervejs.
Hvad hvis jeg skal aflyse? +
Giv os 24 timers varsel og vi finder en ny tid uden besvær. Vi er fleksible og forstår hverdagen.
Bruger I skånsomme produkter? +
Ja — vi arbejder med professionelle mærker der er skånsomme mod hår og skalp. Fortæl os om allergier, så tilpasser vi behandlingen.
Kan I hjælpe med at vælge farve? +
Absolut. Vi tilbyder gratis farvekonsultation — vi ser på din hudtone og dit hår og anbefaler det bedste resultat.
Laver I brudefrisurer og gallaopsat? +
Ja — vi tilbyder brudefrisure, konfirmation, gallastyling og meget mere. Kontakt os for en prøvefrisure.
